actions.replacement_statement: Classification rubrics should make scoring explicit and auditable by documenting deterministic signals, scoring formulas, rejection rules, and lifecycle/status boundaries without adding extraction, durable memory promotion, cluster writes, or runtime evaluation.
applies_when: Apply as a generic rubric/scorer design principle for classification pipelines; verify against the target project context.
revisit_when: When classification signals, scoring formulas, or rejection rules change.
When monitor/adversarial evidence shows the rubric produces misleading classifications.
actions.reason: Original statement was truncated from the Gate 3 scorer/rubric section. The corrected fields were reviewed by the durable lead session and approved for future promotion consideration.
